hero.tagline: Web Developer · Building digital products that are clean and resilient.
about.title: Who I Am
about.bio1: I'm a Software Developer based in Jakarta, focused on building fast and reliable interactive web applications. With experience at a national-scale logistics company, I'm accustomed to high-transaction systems — from billing gateways to real-time operational dashboards.
about.bio2: My approach always starts with deeply understanding the problem — both technically and from the user's perspective. I enjoy challenges that demand efficient, scalable solutions, not just quick fixes.
about.bio3: Outside work, I'm interested in mobile development, open-source, and building small tools that help with everyday life.
